programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: As the oldest prison in California, San Quentin is steeped in a violent history, so it has a set of regulations and procedures to maintain order; inmates often operate under a different code of conduct; gangs control "prison politics."

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Boredom reigns supreme for prisoners who spend endless hours, days and months confined to their cells; some have devised creative ways to pass the time; one inmate is creating a wall mural, but not with real art supplies.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin's warden says that other than an inmate's release date, visits are the most important things in their lives; for some, visits are rare moments of intimacy; for others, they are business transaction opportunities.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inside San Quentin, gangs, drugs and sheer boredom make up a violent mix; Scanvinski Hymes has been in prison since he was 18 years old; almost 20 years later, he's racked up the highest number of violent offenses in California prison history.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: San Quentin has one of the longest histories of violence; whether it's an inmate fresh off the street, a gang dropout in protective custody, or an officer trying to maintain order, they've all fallen victim to violent attacks.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: At San Quentin, every inmate is marked with a security level based on his crime and prison behavior; serving as a reception center, the overpopulated prison must house a dangerous mix of levels within close proximity of one another.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A routine cell search reveals an inmate on the edge, and prison officials intervene; cameras are turned over to the inmates for a glimpse behind the walls of the Wabash Valley Correctional Facility.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Indiana's Wabash Valley Correctional Facility is an isolated fortress with three officers for every 200 inmates; some inmates find themselves in racial conflict, while others seek conflict elsewhere.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The vast majority of inmates live in two-man cells but even with careful screening, conflicts can still arise between cell mates; one inmate covers up his own beating, and plucked from death row, another inmate tries to make a difference.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: As the oldest prison in California, San Quentin is steeped in a violent history, so it has a set of regulations and procedures to maintain order; inmates often operate under a different code of conduct; gangs control "prison politics."

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Boredom reigns supreme for prisoners who spend endless hours, days and months confined to their cells; some have devised creative ways to pass the time; one inmate is creating a wall mural, but not with real art supplies.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Wichita, Kansas and surrounding Sedgwick County take pride in their Wild West roots, but Billy the Kid's gang would be seriously outgunned by the notorious gangs of modern day Wichita.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: In Wichita, Kansas, a young woman says she stabbed a man in self-defense; a skinhead with a violent past leaves his girlfriend battered and bruised.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A convicted thief continues his stealing ways inside the jail; a former law enforcement officer turned meth addict serves time with and grows closer to her dealer; a man gets arrested for allegedly threatening the sheriff.

programme.title: Lockup: Wichita: Extended Stay
programme.desc: An inmate with incredible artistic abilities is charged in tragic crime; another inmate's seeming obsession with jail food causes problems; an unconventional marriage ends violently.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de pasar meses rastreando a su objetivo, Tony se queda con la sangre de un agente del NCIS en sus manos y es tarea de Gibbs ayudarlo a armar las piezas del rompecabezas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre una sorpresa impactante cuando un joven marine llega a su fiesta de bienvenida con una herida mortal de puñalada.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El límite entre la vida personal y profesional de McGee se difumina cuando NCIS descubre una conexión entre su abuela y el asesinato de un teniente de la Marina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Arreglos secretos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un profesor universitario involucrado en un programa de becas cuestionable. Mientras, Danny descubre que su padre ocultó que el fiscal del distrito lo investiga por ética y procedimientos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Batallas de custodia
programme.desc: Erin investiga el caso de un policía acusado de matar a un sospechoso detenido. Frank le aconseja ceñirse a los hechos para evitar un escándalo. Mientras, Jamie insta a Eddie a perdonarla.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Más allá de todo
programme.desc: Un detective del distrito de Danny es asesinado mientras trabajaba encubierto. Frank busca al asesino, pero descubre un gran secreto del fallecido. Mientras, Jamie y Eddie ayudan a Nicky a encontrar a un excompañero de clase.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Exilio
programme.desc: Cuando Danny es asignado a servicio modificado tras investigar un caso prohibido, se da cuenta de que tropezó con algo secreto. Al pasarle la pista a su padre, Frank se alarma.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está persiguiendo a un sospechoso en Phoenix que está secuestrando víctimas con insomnio. Además, Hotch y García se enfrentan a la amenaza del grupo de sicarios clandestinos, llamados“La docena sucia.”

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras la muerte de dos agentes encubiertos de la DEA y la desaparición de un tercero, el UAC se suma a la NSA para investigar si una red clandestina de drogas por Internet está involucrada.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: UAC está buscando a un sospechoso que tal vez esté fascinado por inquietantes experimentos médicos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS busca al responsable de un asesino a sueldo que apunta a un Teniente Comandante de la Armada, mientras Abby descubre secretos familiares tras pruebas para donar un riñón.

programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.desc: Ali-san pressures Iruma to go through his evil cycle; Iruma's classmates praise him on how much more confident he has become; Iruma proposes something to Kalego once he realizes how horrific the Misfit Class' classroom truly is.

programme.title: Warlords of Sigrdrifa
programme.desc: Sonoka tries to get into her plane but her fear holds her back. Meanwhile, Azuzu and Claudia manage to escape from Valhalla.

programme.title: Warlords of Sigrdrifa
programme.desc: Sonoka and Miyako get a great idea to throw a summer festival at Tateyama to make memories.

programme.title: How Heavy Are the Dumbbells You Lift?
programme.desc: While visiting a tropical paradise for spring break, the gym members compete for the title of Miss Nikunoshima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, los cadáveres de Joan Rogers y sus dos hijas adolescentes fueron encontrados flotando en la Bahía de Tampa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una estudiante de último año de la universidad fue violada y asesinada cerca de un sendero sin pavimentar utilizado por los estudiantes para caminar de un lado del campus al otro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, el pornógrafo de San Francisco Artie Mitchell fue asesinado en su casa. Su hermano y socio comercial, que fue encontrado cerca del lugar con un rifle, luego confiesa haber disparado a Artie, pero la pregunta es si el disparo fue premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vida cambia después de 20 años de haber transcurrido un crimen sin resolver, y lo mismo ocurre con la medicina forense. Hoy en día, un microscopio de alto poder y el perfil de ADN, revelan una pista que nadie había visto antes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre una estudiante universitaria desaparecida lleva a la policía a descubrir que, sin que sus amigos lo supieran, vivía una extraña doble vida, asistía a la escuela de día y trabajaba como prostituta de noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre, Tammy Tatum, fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un incendio sospechoso arrasó un apartamento y mató a dos mujeres jóvenes. La causa del incendio y la identidad de las víctimas no estaban claras.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Batallón de pruebas
programme.desc: Una madre de dos niños pequeños fue encontrada muerta en su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Bruce Miller fue asesinado a tiros en la oficina del negocio de depósito de chatarra que poseía. La escena del crimen estaba casi inmaculada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Sombra de duda
programme.desc: Una mujer es asesinada a tiros en su tienda solo un día antes de testificar contra el hombre acusado de robarla.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los sobrevivientes de las atrocidades nazis reconocieron al arzobispo Trifa, exjefe de la Iglesia Ortodoxa Rumana en los Estados Unidos, por haber dirigido un sangriento ataque contra los judíos durante la Segunda Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Con un pie en el crimen
programme.desc: El cuerpo descompuesto de una mujer joven fue descubierto en un canal de irrigación de Bakersfield. Si había rastros de evidencia, se había lavado con el agua.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team

programme.desc: Firefighters make a grisly discovery while responding to a house fire in a Toronto suburb; as a family searches for answers, investigators launch an elaborate undercover sting that reveals a devious murder-for-hire plot and the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Summer's over and the Degrassi kids are back…in droves. A neighbouring high school has been amalgamated with the Junior High and things are a bit of a zoo.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time at Degrassi. Emma’s a serious contender for first prize, but when the results of her experiment don't fall in line with her hypothesis, she's in a panic.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Joey is going away for the weekend with his latest girlfriend, and Craig is surprised when Joey tells him he can stay on his own – and even have the guys over! When the guys get to Craig’s for the weekend, they can’t think of much to do

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Degrassi Panthers have a new star soccer player, Spinner. His victory’s even sweeter when Paige agrees to a movie. When the losing team's defensive back, the gorgeous Dean, invites a smitten Paige to a house party, she cancels on Spinner.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie are the best of friends. But Ellie is starting to want more…Marco though can’t seem to respond in kind. He’s more and more confused about what and who he’s looking for…

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When class clown JT acts up in Science class, his teacher Ms. Hatzilakos gives him a serious detention - assisting her with the guinea pigs all week. JT’s annoyed.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Sean. He and Emma are back together. He’s a star on the basketball team. And he and Jimmy have buried the hatchet. Jimmy’s even invited him to a party. But the good feelings don’t last for long.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy are back together, but it doesn’t feel quite the same. Ash may not look the same as last year – she’s a Goth now – but Jimmy’s sure she’s still the same golden girl inside.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma’s mom is away for a few days and it’s just her and her step-dad, Mr. Simpson. He’s supportive of Emma’s involvement in “Food for Thought”; the student group who wants to remove genetically modified (GM) foods from the school cafeteria.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being in counseling for a long time, Paige is positive she’s recovered from her date rape. In fact, she’s convinced her life is back to normal – Dean and what he did are behind her forever. She never wants to see him again, so she’s dismissive.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s exam time and everyone’s stressed – especially Craig. In a surprise visit from his father, Craig learns that his dad is very eager to have him back in his life.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An infant is rushed to the emergency room with serious breathing problems. Within months, there are more than 30 similar cases. Can doctors find the cause and a cure?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Shortly after daybreak, a fire is started in a dumpster in Vancouver. No one sees the arsonist or the fire, which burns for hours in the deserted parking lot. But there's more than garbage in this flaming container.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a day of fishing in a quiet village in Switzerland, a teenage boy doesn't return home as planned. The investigation reveals some important microscopic evidence in the water near where he was last seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Robert Sims returns home after working the night shift and finds his wife unconscious on the kitchen floor. Their son is fast asleep in an upstairs bedroom, but their six-week-old daughter, Heather, is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a cold December night in 1993, Rose Larner stopped in a convenience store on her way to her boyfriend's house. She was never seen or heard from again. Rose's disappearance remained a mystery, until a tiny clue is found years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a human skull and some bones were discovered at a Boy Scout Camp near Farmington, Missouri. Facial reconstruction aids the investigators in this case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When four-month-old Ryan Stallings dies under suspicious circumstances, his mother is ultimately convicted of his murder. But months later, new evidence emerges from a startling source — his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors are puzzled when a two-year-old boy is rushed to the hospital with brain seizures and breathing difficulties. Finally, the boy's sister provides an important clue, raising the possibility of a rare syndrome.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Sometime during a neighborhood Christmas party, five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared. Investigators turned to forensic science to help them see what the witnesses missed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The doctors at the hospital couldn't determine the cause of Bobby Curley's hallucinations and intense pain. They treated it as a neurological disorder but his condition deteriorated. He was being poisoned.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Who was the sexual offender who murdered two adolescent boys in Nebraska? The key to stopping him would be the unique composition of the "junk rope" he used to tie his victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Mark Fair left for work and his fiancée, Karla Brown, stayed home. Later, he found her dead. During the autopsy, bite marks on her body were re-examined and forensic odontology identified the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Janice Johnson was found dead at the foot of her basement stairs. Police in Nova Scotia had to unravel the circumstances surrounding Janice's death and answer the question: Was it an accident or murder?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, more than a dozen children in Seattle, Washington, were fighting for their lives. Each one of them had contracted a serious unknown illness. After one died, investigators knew the clock was ticking.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky cannot help Fred out by performing at his lodge show because he is already booked for a radio show that day. Lucy volunteers to help out so she and Fred whip up a Western act. Ricky discovers it's a rodeo show that he's booked for, not a radio show.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky finds Lucy exhausted after a trying day with little Ricky and insists it is time their son started nursery school. Lucy's protests are overridden and Ricky takes young Ricky to nursery school, but the baby comes down with tonsillitis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is offered a European booking that is too important to refuse but he can't afford to take Lucy with him. Lucy is furious at the prospect of being left behind, and when Ricky wants to take Fred Mertz along as the tour manager, Ethel too, is incensed.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is unable to produce her birth certificate to get a passport for the Ricardos' and Mertzes' European jaunt. She calls her hometown for the birth certificate but discovers that none exists for her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens the Mertzes' and Ricardos' plans for Ricky's European band tour. They are all booked on the ocean liner Constitution for the trans-Atlantic voyage.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on the deck of the Constitution, ready to set sail for Europe when Lucy rushes down the gangplank for one last goodbye to Little Ricky who will be in her mother's care while she is away.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy anticipates a 2nd honeymoon with Ricky on their boat trip to Europe, but Ricky's band duties keep him too busy. Lucy happily looks forward to romantic evenings and daytime deck games on board the ship as the Ricardos and the Mertzes sail for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is thrilled at being in London, and most of all wants to see the Queen. She misses the Queen at Buckingham Palace where she and Ethel try to make the guard smile.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous after Ricky dances with Angela Randall, an up-and-coming British actress. She gets Ricky away from her by going to the country estate of Sir Clive Richardson, a prominent English film producer, for a fox hunt he is hosting.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes prepare to leave London for Paris, Lucy realizes that they will not have time to visit her ancestral land of Scotland. She was looking forward to seeking out members of the McGillicuddy clan, her distant relatives.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Equipped with an English-French dictionary, Lucy sets out to explore Paris and discover an artist whose paintings will become very valuable – she knows she has "the eye."

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes, sightseeing in Paris, are sitting at a sidewalk cafe that Charles Boyer is known to frequent. Lucy thinks she has spotted Boyer and turns to jelly, but Ricky convinces her it's a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy goes on a hunger strike in order to get Ricky to buy an expensive dress from a famous French designer. He finally gives in but returns the dress when he discovers that Ethel smuggled her food while on the strike.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Fred, managing Ricky's band while on European tour, routes the musicians to Locarno instead of Lucerne. Ricky is distraught and Lucy suggests a hike in the Alps with the Mertzes to take his mind off his problems.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are on a train for Rome when Lucy is 'discovered' by an Italian film director who offers her a role in his new picture, "Bitter Grapes".

programme.desc: The Ricardos and Mertzes are leaving Genoa for Nice when Lucy decides they should all go by bicycle because they can't see enough of the countries from the train. Ricky and the Mertzes agree under protest and after an exhausting day of pedaling.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky is working in Monte Carlo, but Fred goofed and bargained for too little money for the engagement. Lucy and Ethel go to the casino to watch, but when Lucy finds a chip that someone dropped and replaces it on the table, it wins and continues to do so.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Although they both agree not to try and influence Little Ricky's future, Lucy buys a toy doctor kit and Ricky gives him a drum set. Their son takes to the drums and begins to play it non-stop for days.

programme.desc: Part 2 of 5. Ready to fight fire with fire, the JOE team constructs a M.A.S.S. Device to counter Cobra. Meanwhile, Duke, still a captive of Cobra and Destro, fights for his life in the gladiator-style arena at Cobra Mountain.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: Baseball's Seasons
programme.desc: Hank Aaron breaks Babe Ruth’s HR record. The A’s dominate the AL and face the Dodgers in the World Series.

programme.title: MST3K: Radar Secret Service
programme.desc: Mike and the bots learn the art of safe driving and why you should pay attention at railroad crossings in the 1959 short, Last Clear Chance. Later, they watch government agents use radar technology to catch criminals in Radar Secret Service.

programme.title: MST3K: Mad Monster
programme.desc: Things get hairy on the Satellite of Love thanks to the lupine antics of The Mad Monster (1942) and the second chapter of Radar Men from the Moon (1952).

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Holocaust
programme.desc: After the ninth chapter of Radar Men From The Moon (1952) ends in technical difficulties, Joel and the bots must endure Robot Holocaust (1986). They pretend to be characters from the movie, but Tom Servo is the only one who is into it.

programme.title: MST3K Shorts
programme.desc: A band of no-good punks beat a guy for driving too slow and steal his mechanical pencil, before arriving to pick up their missing member Jamie, the son of the man they've just beaten.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: In part two of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the team discuss the Satellite of Love crew.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K
programme.desc: In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.

programme.title: MST3K: The Painted Hills
programme.desc: A Lassie movie, set in 1870s California amongst rival gold miners. The 1950s-era short teaches college students how to improve their hygiene.

programme.title: MST3K: The Robot vs. The Aztec Mummy
programme.desc: Scientists search for the ancient breastplate of a mummy, culminating in a mad scientist's attempt to fight the creature through the construction of a robot.

programme.title: MST3K: The She-Creature
programme.desc: The SOL crew is subjected to a dark, dreary tale of hypnotism, murder, and chesty amphibians.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of inventor Chuck Hoberman with his sphere and a video of Yo-Yo and Nicholas Ma. The neighbors are waiting for Bob Dog's helicopter to land. They discover that the helicopter responds to guitar music.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Maya Lin at her studio to see how she first makes small models of big things she is working on. They go to Penn Station to see what she created there. In Make-Believe, there's a video visit with cellist Yo-Yo Ma.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers sees a performance by the Westminster Bell Choir and shows how people make bells. Mayor Maggie has a bell that she plays with King Friday and gives to Henrietta as a doorbell. Daniel and H.J. Elephant dress up as astronauts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Visiting a nearby dance studio, Mister Rogers watches a class of young students learning to use ribbons as part of their dance routine. Henrietta is still ringing her new bell and X the Owl is growing quite frustrated.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Percussionist Tim Adams performs. H.J. Elephant is dressed in his outerspace costume as he tells Lady Aberlin about pretending to fly to the moon. He makes a loud trumpet sound which causes alarm for X and Henrietta.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of himself and Sylvia Earle snorkeling in the ocean. Lady Elaine says she is hiding from something they are afraid of from outer space. Mister Rogers suggests when something is scary on TV, turn it off.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber places a costume on top of Trolley to participate in the upcoming parade. Prince Tuesday is collecting comforting messages for X the Owl and Henrietta Pussycat in hopes of drawing them out for the parade.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers puts together a small fountain and shows a video of fountains around the world. King Friday gives a fountain to Westwood. Mayor Maggie searches for water for the fountain and is squirted by Lady Elaine Fairchilde.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Neighbor Aber wears a raincoat as Lady Elaine continues squirting water from her hose. He helps Corney install an umbrella over the factory. Mr. McFeely stops by with a videotape about how people make concrete sidewalks.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Captain Arnold shows Mister Rogers various aspects of being a firefighter. Volunteer Firefighter Handyman Negri asks Lady Elaine for her garden hose. Smoke is seen coming from the Platypus mound. Lady Elaine puts out the fire.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Fred Rogers visits a school and sees what the students do during a fire drill. Everyone is working to repair the Platypus Mound, which was damaged by a fire. Lady Elaine Fairchilde receives an award from King Friday XIII.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers demonstrates how to use a computer mouse as he introduces viewers to the "online neighborhood." The King and Queen are searching for the "royal mouse."

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday insists that the royal Hula Mouse must return to the Castle and asks Miss Paulificate to call "every person in the world." King Friday is flying around the world searching for the royal mouse.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches demonstrations of mechanical ball inventions. Prince Tuesday and Lady Aberlin are outside the castle playing with a unique toy. King Friday is unhappy about not finding Hula Mouse and breaks the toy.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Not everyone in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe has recovered from the previous day's drama. King Friday tries to apologize. Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make bread.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers watches children dancers perform and musicians play. King Friday sincerely apologizes to Hula Mouse for his previous behavior. Lady Elaine presents an exhibit of round things. Mr. McFeely shows a film on how marbles are made.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about curiosity. He uses a frame to look closely at different parts of a large mural, and the vegetables in the piece remind him of his trip to "The Edible Schoolyard" in Berkeley, California, where children garden.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Negri's Music Shop where musicians are playing different homemade instruments. Mr. McFeely brings a video showing how people make ice cream cones.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Wonder what it's like to go up in a bucket lift? Mister Rogers rides 60 feet up in the air in one and then comes back down. Mr. McFeely has a video about how people make ice cream.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: There's a new store in the Neighborhood -- it's Tony Chiroldes' shop where he sells books, toys and costumes. Tony has always been curious about what it would be like to travel in outer space, and he tries on an astronaut costume.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Guitarist Manuel Barrueco provides an amazing performance. King Friday requests a "looking inside things device" from Corney. The best Corney could come up with is a "look carefully device" magnifying glass.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about the graceful nature of the fish. He visits a ballet studio where he watches a performance. Lady Elaine wants H.J. Elephant to be on her first program, but H.J. is hesitant since he cannot read very well.

programme.desc: Past mistakes haunt the present and threaten a new love affair between a troubled home health aide and her new patient.

programme.title: Lip Service
programme.desc: Cat and Sam arrive back in Glasgow after spending time in South America.

programme.title: Lip Service
programme.desc: Sam plans the perfect day for Cat's birthday; Tess leaves work early and events take an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Lip Service
programme.desc: Sam starts asking questions and Frankie must make a drastic decision, Sadie and Lexy have surprising guests and Tess enlists Ed's help.

programme.title: Lockdown Lovers
programme.desc: Two girls get stuck together long-term when COVID-19 lockdowns hit Australia; seeing if they will drive each other crazy, or fall in love.

programme.title: Live: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: RiffTrax Live: Night of the Living Dead is guaranteed to be scarier than Brad Pitt's beard in World War Z and funnier than the acting on The Walking Dead! You won't want to miss it!

programme.title: Live: Plan 9 From Outer Space
programme.desc: Join Mike Nelson, Kevin Murphy and Bill Corbett live and onstage at the historic Belcourt Theater in Nashville as they riff along hilariously to Ed Wood's classic B-movie blunder “Plan 9 from Outer Space”.

programme.title: RiffTrax: The RiffTrax Yule Log
programme.desc: We're proud to present a new kind of fireplace video, one filled with festive comedy and music to be enjoyed by all! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: MST3K Reunion
programme.desc: Mike, Kevin and Bill were joined on stage by their MST3K colleagues at the State Theatre in Minneapolis to bring it back to their roots in an MST3K cast reunion the likes of which have never been seen before!

programme.title: RiffTrax Shorts: At Your Fingertips: Floats (Live Edition)
programme.desc: This short instructs how to build a general TYPE of garbage-craft, a floating garbage craft, rather than focusing on utilizing a specific type of garbage to build a craft. This short is a parody and contains a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: Firehead
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this "so bad it's still bad" movie where Estonian cyborgs shoot lasers out of their eyes!

programme.title: RiffTrax: Fun in Balloon Land
programme.desc: We would say that Fun In Balloonland is our favorite RiffTrax movie, but there's just one problem: it's hard to really describe it as a movie. It is an event. To attempt to describe its plot to you, would be like attempting to divide by zero.

programme.title: RiffTrax Presents: Deadly Instincts

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una ciclista de montaña tiene múltiples heridas y su novio tiene múltiples desmayos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Los médicos luchan por salvar a un joven traído a urgencias congelado y sin pulso; un hombre se enferma de muerte mientras asiste a su propia fiesta de aniversario.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una tortuga caimán mordedora está sujeta al cuello de un hombre y no la suelta; un médico de emergencias corre contra un huracán inminente; y un podador de árboles está a 20 pies sobre el suelo cuando es atravesado por su motosierra.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos paracaidistas son llevados a urgencias; varios clientes de un club de baile dejan de respirar repentinamente; y una futura novia puede perderse su boda después de que su dedo se atasque en un frasco de maquillaje.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una paciente llega con parálisis en las piernas, que misteriosamente se extiende hasta los brazos mientras su novio la observa horrorizado; un niño es aplastado por un cuatrimotor y el hospital no cuenta con el equipo adecuado para tratarlo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Una trabajadora del hospital siente que se está muriendo; el hijo pequeño de un médico es un paciente en su propia sala de emergencias; el pasatiempo de una mujer de recolectar hongos silvestres la envía a la sala de emergencias.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre es llevado de urgencia a la sala de emergencias, aparentemente arañado por un tigre; un paciente dice que le han disparado en la cabeza; una mujer tiene muerte cerebral, pero un médico cree que puede salvarse.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre llega a urgencias con la piel azulada; una adolescente tiene dolores abdominales que los médicos no han podido diagnosticar durante años; y un médico lucha por salvar la vida del único superviviente de un accidente aéreo.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: La verdadera razón detrás de la barriga abultada y los dolores de estómago de una adolescente sorprende a las enfermeras; y un hombre delirante que grita por su "auto", revela pistas sobre su propio intento de asesinato.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un hombre piensa que está estreñido, pero su condición es potencialmente mortal; un médico que trata a una mujer con un paro cardíaco descubre que está tratando a dos pacientes en uno; y la familia del paciente no tiene ni idea.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Dos pacientes tienen extrañas lesiones de pesca; un instructor de artes marciales sufre dolores abdominales; cuando las víctimas adolescentes de un accidente automovilístico llenan su pequeña sala de emergencias, un médico debe tomar decisiones críticas.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un médico de urgencias está tratando de resolver por qué un estudiante tiene dificultad para respirar; un hombre se cae de un techo y es atravesado por una pala; un policía sufre un infarto que pone en peligro al personal del hospital.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un golfista que no responde necesita una cirugía inmediata para salvarle la vida; 3 adultos casi desnudos causan estragos en la sala de emergencias; y un corredor de maratón empuja sus límites demasiado lejos.

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas
programme.desc: Un playboy geriátrico ingresa a la sala de emergencias con una lesión menor que rápidamente se vuelve mortal; y la dieta de jugos de un fanático de la salud lo deja en un estado comatoso.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso que conduce ebrio dice que sólo salió a comprar un bocadillo. Una pareja se delata cuando la policía hace preguntas. La policía detiene a alguien que cree que se le tendió una trampa.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre intenta pelear con todo el vecindario. Un fugitivo está convencido de que la policía le dijo que se fuera en su bicicleta. Una mamá joven con problemas tiene una segunda oportunidad.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un motociclista causa una persecución por las calles. Ni un carro que no prende impide que un hombre corra de la policía. Un conductor no logra evadir a la policía y se disculpa raramente con su novia.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Durante una parada de tránsito un sospechoso decide huir a campo través. Una mujer rehúsa mentir por el amigo de su hijo. Se captura en video a un hombre escondiendo artículos en un lugar obvio.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: El último esfuerzo para huir de la policía termina en llamas. Varias unidades se unen para acabar con una situación peligrosa. La policía vigila una batalla de custodia conllevando comestibles caros.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Unas placas raras ayudan a prevenir un robo. Una pelea por un amor no correspondido se torna violenta. La policía detiene a un hombre sin ropa por un presunto incendio provocado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se desmiente a un sospechoso cuando su víctima presenta un video de seguridad. El miedo le gana a un conductor cuando trata de escapar. Un viaje de noche al mercado termina en llanto.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una pelea entre hermanos se intensifica cuando uno saca un arma. Un hombre viola la orden de restricción con su exnovia y esto le trae consecuencias. Los oficiales aconsejan a una mujer que quiere tener mejor control sobre su vida.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Los agentes capturan a un sospechoso y le salvan la vida. Un esposo reacciona mal cuando su esposa descubre sus actividades en internet. Un hombre agresivo lastima a todos a su alrededor.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una noche familiar de ver fútbol termina en una pelea. Un ladrón acaba con la buena voluntad de la policía al encontrarlo con artículos robados. Un hombre admite no poder escapar de la policía al ser atrapado.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso no logra convencer a los oficiales que tenía buen motivo al tratar de escapar. Un compañero entrometido impide que una pareja deje sus malos hábitos. Un esposo y esposa pelean por su bebé.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un hombre inocente se asusta cuando un motociclista fugitivo choca en su remolque. Un sospechoso se hace el desentendido. Los oficiales se decepcionan al enfrentar a un hombre con antecedentes.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un joven no puede entender la magnitud de su error. Una mujer aprende a no subirse en autos desconocidos. Problemas matrimoniales se descontrolan cuando un marido recoge a su esposa de la cárcel.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso muy lento acepta que no puede escapar de la ley. Los oficiales tratan de reconstruir una pelea salvaje entre vecinos. Un exnovio vengativo intenta extorcionar a su exnovia pero termina inesperadamente mal.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: Un contrabandista intenta darse a la fuga en la frontera brasileña y termina colisionando su automóvil contra un móvil policial. Mientras que al caer la noche, los agentes aduaneros sorprenden a cambistas ilegales en la frontera de Ipiales.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: Ecuador se convulsiona cuando las fuerzas especiales irrumpen en el domicilio de dos narcotraficantes mientras que en las fronteras colombianas los agentes combaten la venta ilegal de divisas y el contrabando de alimentos.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: Una madre y su hijo intentan darse a la fuga al ser interceptados por la aduana en al cruce de Ecuador a Colombia mientras que en el puente de la Amistad en Brasil la policía detiene a un menor de edad con un cargamento de marihuana.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica
programme.desc: En un operativo de control de embarcaciones el grupo de antinarcóticos de Iquitos, encuentra un cargamento de cocaína abandonado. Mientras que una familia argentina es delatada por la unidad canina de control en la frontera de Chile y Perú.

programme.title: Fronteras peligrosas de Latinoamérica

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Barbas, the Demon of Fear, returns and tricks Paige into giving him Cole's powers, and plots revenge on the Halliwell sisters by playing them against their darkest fears.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Phoebe must constantly save the life of her new boyfriend, a warlock shows up from the future, claiming that future Cole sent him in order to kill the boyfriend before Phoebe dies instead.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige gets to know the whitelighter in her, when she meets her first charge, a man named Sam. Unbeknownst to her, Sam is actually her real father. Meanwhile, Cole rashly tries to get himself vanquished by the Charmed Ones.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe falls prey to Jeric, a demon in search of the perfect body to hold the spirit of Isis, his dead lover. To trap the spirit, Jeric mummifies Phoebe's body. Meanwhile, Cole tries to save Phoebe by making a deal with the demon.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After kidnapping Phoebe, Cole sends a shapeshifter to assume Phoebe's identity to help him manipulate Piper and Paige into giving him ownership of the manor, allowing him access to the powerful Nexus located beneath the house.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: In his twisted attempt to win Phoebe's heart back, Cole casts a spell that alters reality, which eliminates Paige as a Halliwell and destroys the Power of Three.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Glen returns to Paige's life with a big surprise - he is about to get married to a girl called Jessica. Meanwhile, the sisters summon a Witch Doctor whom they want to dispatch all the evil remnants that surround the Manor.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A demon attacks The Charmed Ones with dream dust, causing their nightmares to come to life. Paige is harassed by an evil clown at a baby shower, Piper has an affair and Phoebe is chased by a maniac with a chainsaw.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: After Piper is put on bed rest for high blood pressure, Phoebe and Paige discover that all magic has disappeared from the world.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones face a demon who has been killing leprechauns and stealing their magic. The leprechauns endow the sisters with good luck, which enables Paige to gain material wealth, Phoebe to meet a man, and Piper to book a major star to play P3.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Piper and Leo begin to have marital problems, Piper casts a spell to allow them to literally see their past together. However, the spell goes awry when Phoebe and Paige are sent back in time to relive Piper's memories.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: Un visitante viene a cambiar la vida de los del Monte. Julieta tiene una recaída enfrente de Paula. Miguel visita a su hija y la ve muy extraña, pero ella no accede a su propuesta de ir al médico juntos.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta le confiesa a Juan que no puede tener hijos, a pesar de su deseo por ser madre, pero no es capaz de revelar su verdadera enfermedad. Gaspar acepta que Guadalupe participe en un concurso y gana el primer lugar.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: José pelea con Beatriz por la custodia de Simón. Paula y Juan dan rienda suelta a su pasión en sueños. Esteban le pide dinero a José, pero él dice que lo tiene en la hacienda. José lo amenaza con revelarle todo a Juan.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Paula que no puede olvidarla. Gaspar le declara la guerra a José por defender a su mujer. Esteban está en la ruina por ser un jugador compulsivo. Emilio invita a Rosa al hotel sin saber que Sofía lo espera allá.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Se arma una fuerte pelea cuando los Reyes llegan a la hacienda para hablar con Norma y Jimena. Eva se va de la hacienda por orden de Fernando y Raquel le prohíbe que se acerque a su hija Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando ordena un ataque contra los hermanos Reyes, Franco encuentra una oportunidad para revertir la desgracia de su familia después de perder a Rosario. Norma se empeña en olvidar a Juan.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Franco firma los documentos que lo acreditan como el propietario de la fortuna de Eduvina Trueba, aunque Juan persuade a su hermano para evitar que arruine su vida con una mujer mayor que él.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eduvina no sigue las órdenes de su médico, Franco tampoco calma su euforia y las consecuencias son inevitables. Juan y Óscar quieren irse del pueblo, imaginan a su hermano en una luna de miel.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Malcolm y Carmela humillan a Franco y acusan a Eva de ladrona, ella se entera de que Reyes es dueño de la hacienda y busca a sus hermanos. Juan obliga al viudo de Eduvina a poner todo en su sitio.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: As Alicia works with Will on the appeal of a death row inmate, she agrees to a conjugal visit with Peter in order to get information from him since her client was convicted under Peter's regime as state's attorney.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: While representing the daughter of one of the partner's at the law firm, Alicia finds herself attracted to her co-counsel and his unorthodox approach to defending their client.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Peter needs Alicia to testify on his behalf as his appeals process begins sooner than expected. At the same time, she prepares to defend a scientist accused of arson.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia deals with tricky office politics when she's asked to represent the firm's senior partner after he's arrested. Meanwhile, Peter's evidentiary hearing hits the skids, leading Alicia to suspect that he may, in fact, actually be guilty of corruption.

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When a star high school quarterback dies from an overdose of painkillers, Alicia represents the doctor who prescribed the medication. At home, Alicia and the kids deal with some bad news and she gives Peter information that makes his blood boil.

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Diane begins to question the resistance group's tactics; Blum approaches Maia with a job offer. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight
